evidence.description: Aggregates.md defines Note.isEmpty as '全ブロックが空（または divider のみ）の Note' — broader than the spec's narrow blocks.length===1 + paragraph definition (REQ-003, PROP-025).
Scope says pipeline ends when NoteFileSaved is returned, yet REQ-011/REQ-012 cover Step 4 updateProjections (Curate context) — scope contradiction.
PROP-024 lacks a defined construction strategy that prevents independent assignment of blocks/body. PROP-025 'empty/whitespace-only' predicate is not precisely defined.
REQ-003 narrowly defines empty as single paragraph; multi-empty-paragraph and divider-only edge cases are not enumerated. aggregates.md treats them as Empty Note.

Confirmed CaptureDeps does NOT include serializeBlocksToMarkdown or FrontmatterSerializerToYaml — both are correctly classified as Shared Kernel / module-internal pure functions in the spec (REQ-006, PROP-016).
SerializeBlocksToMarkdown is defined as a Shared Kernel pure function interface — alignment with verification-architecture.md L76-85 confirmed.

Coverage matrix maps every REQ to ≥1 PROP, but REQ-011 (Feed.refreshSort) has no PROP for sort refresh; REQ-017 (CaptureAutoSave function signature) is only covered by integration test PROP-017, with no Tier-0 type assertion.

summary: FAIL. Six findings spanning four dimensions. Critical: REQ-003/PROP-025 narrow isEmpty definition contradicts aggregates.md L120/L142 (empty = '全ブロックが空 or divider のみ'). REQ-018/PROP-024 cross-language coherence (TS→Rust→TS NoteFileSaved construction) is not specified or made enforceable. Scope contradiction: pipeline ends at NoteFileSaved per L7 but REQ-011/REQ-012 cover Step 4. PROP-025 'empty/whitespace-only' is undefined (length===0? trim===''?). REQ-011 Feed sort refresh has no PROP. REQ-017 signature claim lacks Tier-0 verification. REQ-008 mislabels SaveNoteRequested emission as 'Step 3 (pre-write)' while EARS says it occurs BEFORE Step 3.
